evals.prompt: Validate the specs in the current repository before implementation.
evals.expected_output: Workflow performs repository review, validates spec structure and completeness, applies 3 perspectives (Technical/Architecture, Implementation Feasibility, Completeness/Gaps) with fresh context, aggregates findings, prioritizes issues by severity, generates validation report with recommendations, provides readiness assessment

evals.prompt: Review the specs for potential technical issues and architectural inconsistencies. Focus on the technology stack choices.
evals.expected_output: Workflow applies Technical & Architecture Review perspective, analyzes technology stack compatibility, identifies architectural inconsistencies, assesses scalability and performance considerations, documents findings with specific examples, provides recommendations for technical improvements

evals.prompt: Check if the specs are ready for implementation. Identify any gaps or missing details that would block implementation.
evals.expected_output: Workflow applies Implementation Feasibility Review perspective, evaluates task breakdown completeness, identifies missing dependencies, assesses time estimates realism, checks for ambiguous specifications, validates success criteria measurability, provides implementation readiness assessment
